title: Sour Crumbly Korean Hazelnut Crumble
description: A romantic Korean dish featuring hazelnuts, air-fried for a delicate texture and balanced with sour notes for added depth.
instructions: Mix hazelnuts, almond meal, sugar, cornstarch or arrowroot powder, salt, and vanilla extract in a bowl.
Add water gradually while mixing until you get a crumbly dough consistency. It should be somewhat wet but not too sticky.
Roll small balls of the mixture into your hand and press them gently into an air fryer basket lined with parchment paper or silicon mat.
Cook for 8-10 minutes or until golden brown, shaking the basket halfway through cooking to ensure even browning.
Let cool slightly before serving. Serve as a dessert accompaniment.
